headline: Johnson Controls (JCI) Stock Looks Fully Priced On Its 136% Run
summary: Johnson Controls International has delivered a strong 136.3% return over the past 5 years. However, at around US$146 per share, both the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and the earnings-based multiples currently point to the stock trading at a premium rather than at a clear discount. A 136.3% gain over 5 years suggests investors have already priced in a lot of good news, so fresh upside may depend on how the fundamentals evolve from here. Analyst upgrades tied to data...
